sql_array: CREATE TABLE events (event_time TIMESTAMP, duration INTERVAL);
INSERT INTO events (event_time, duration) VALUES ('2023-10-01 10:00:00', INTERVAL 1 HOUR + INTERVAL 2 HOUR);
UPDATE events SET duration = duration + INTERVAL 3 HOUR WHERE event_time = '2023-10-01 10:00:00';
SELECT event_time, duration, event_time + duration AS end_time FROM events;
SELECT event_time + INTERVAL 4 HOUR AS new_event_time FROM events WHERE duration > INTERVAL 1 HOUR;
